parameter.name: haId
parameter.label: Home Appliance ID
parameter.description: Unique identifier representing a specific home appliance.

parameter.name: address
parameter.label: Address
parameter.description: Address of home appliance (hostname or IP)

parameter.name: connectionRetryDelay
parameter.label: Reconnect Delay
parameter.description: Specifies the amount of time (in minutes) to wait before attempting to reconnect after a disconnection occurs, whether due to an offline device or a connection error.

parameter.name: descriptionKey
parameter.label: Description Key
parameter.description: Key to identify the device description (e.g. "BSH.Common.Option.ProgramProgress")

parameter.name: attribute
parameter.label: Attribute
parameter.description: The attribute of the description to map

parameter.name: onValue
parameter.label: ON Values
parameter.description: Comma-separated list of enumeration value keys that map to the ON state (e.g. "Open" or "On,Present"). Any other value is mapped to OFF. This channel is read-only.

parameter.name: unit
parameter.label: Unit Of Measurement
parameter.description: Unit of measurement (optional). The unit is used for representing the value in the GUI as well as for converting incoming values (like from '°F' to '°C'). Examples: "°C", "°F", "%%" (escaped percent)
